---
title: "QMD"
image: profile.jpg
image-alt: 这里应该有一只濑户璨
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Qmdm
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:thekingqmd@163.com
---

**C**hina **T**hree **G**orges **U**niversity | Yichang, Hubei

A **lazy** college student majoring in mechanical engineering
